headlineLabel: In 2009, Twitter made What’s happening? the pulse of digital communities. In 2014, Slack brought the same pulse inside the organization. Now, Human Conversation doesn’t get between us—it brings us together.
headlineText: 20092014NowtwitterDigital communitiesWhat’s happening?Twitter made one question the pulse of digital communities.twitterNov 19 · 2009What’s happening?slackThe organizationWhat’s happening?Slack brought the same pulse inside the organization.slack# general# product# randomNow · Real-world social communitiesHuman Conversationdoesn’t get between us —it brings us together.
ledeText: All the human, social, relationship, and community data moves through human conversation.But with a twist.
storyMarkers: Human Conversation is the only place where connection, and human, social, and community data flows.
